item.histrCn: Woojooyon Clinic provided care in Jongno 3-ga for 10 years and recently relocated to Bukchon, where it has evolved into a clinic focused on refreshing, curing, rehabilitation, and recovery. Before establishing its base in Jongno, Woojooyon Clinic operated by appointment for about a year in a boutique hotel in Nonhyeon-dong, alongside a dermatology clinic and a spa. During that time, we treated only five patients per day, which allowed us to offer highly satisfying and meticulous medical services-an experience that remains a source of great pride for us.
item.specProcMdlcInfo:
Traditional Korean treatment (Chuna manual therapy, acupuncture therapy)
Traditional Korean beauty care (weight loss, detox therapy)
Women's disease (menopausal symptoms, infertility treatment)
item.specFcltyInfo: Offers PR materials in foreign languages
